name: next.js
description: The React Framework – used in production by thousands of companies worldwide.
summary: Next.js is the React framework for production. It offers hybrid static & server rendering, TypeScript support, smart bundling, and incremental static regeneration.
explanation: The repo is organized with app/ (App Router) and pages/ (Pages Router) support. Key entry points are app/layout.tsx and app/page.tsx. Configuration lives in next.config.js and TypeScript in tsconfig.json.
learningPath: Start with app/page.tsx and app/layout.tsx to see the root UI
Explore app/api/ for API routes and server actions
Check next.config.js for build and runtime options
Review components/ for reusable UI patterns
